mapper.insert: INSERT INTO LQ_RECEIPT ( RECEIPT_ID, USER_ID, USER_QUEST_PROGRESS_ID, CATEGORY, VERIFY_STATUS, FILE_PATH, FILE_UPLOAD_NAME, FILE_ORIGINAL_NAME, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( SEQ_LQ_RECEIPT_PK.NEXTVAL, #{userId}, #{userQuestProgressId}, #{category}, #{verifyStatus}, #{filePath}, #{fileUploadName}, #{fileOriginalName}, SYSDATE )
